name: Harvest Spice Tea Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Bring water to a boil in a saucepan and steep Harvest Spice tea bags for 3-5 minutes, then remove the tea bags and discard them.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the remaining ingredients until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into an 8x8-inch greased baking dish.
5. Bake for 25 minutes.
6. Serve warm with butter and sprinkled nutmeg. Top with Harvest Spice Whipped Cream.
Preparation time: 10 minutes
Cooking time: 25 minutes
